leadText: Gear Up (Japanese: アシストギア Assist Gear) is a non-damaging Steel-type move introduced in Generation VII.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Contents 1 Effect 1.1 Generation VIII 1.1.1 Pokémon Brilliant Diamond and Shining Pearl 1.2 Generation IX Effect [ edit | edit source ] Gear Up raises the Attack and Special Attack stats of allied Pokémon (including the user) with the Ability Plus or Minus by one stage each. If powered up by a Steelium Z into Z-Gear Up, the user's Special Attack stat rises one stage. Generation VIII [ edit | edit source ] Pokémon Brilliant Diamond and Shining Pearl [ edit | edit source ] Gear Up cannot be selected in a battle. Generation IX [ edit | edit source ] Gear Up cannot be selected in a battle.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description S M US UM P E Sw Sh LA The user engages its gears to raise the Attack and Sp. Atk stats of ally Pokémon with the Plus or Minus Ability. BD SP S V This move can't be used. It's recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can't be remembered.
